\tablenote{Each row reports the coefficient on lagged sentiment in a factor-adjusted predictive regression of the directional spread return on sentiment and contemporaneous factor returns. Directional spreads are defined so that negative coefficients are theory-consistent: high sentiment predicts lower subsequent returns for the sentiment-prone side. Raw index refers to \var{SENT\_DIV\_PREMIUM}; macro-orthogonalized index refers to \var{SENT\_ORTH\_DIV\_PREMIUM}.}
\tablesource{Author calculations from \texttt{outputs/final\_sentiment\_sweden/final\_bw2006\_horizon\_coefficients.csv}.}
\end{table}
